message:
fix cleanup routine on close

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, labeled, unlabeled]
   # pull_request_target:
-  #   types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, labeled, unlabeled]
+  #   types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, labeled, unlabeled, closed]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 env:
